subject: Cannot access admin dashboard
body: Hi team, I keep getting denied when trying to open the admin dashboard. Please grant access.

subject: Invoice discrepancy
body: Our March invoice appears to include duplicate charges. Can someone verify and update?

subject: Onboarding kickoff
body: Need to schedule onboarding kickoff and provision initial workspace for new team.

subject: App is not working after update
body: After latest update users report a login error and white screen. Need urgent help.
